title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: Cursor reports PayPal could deliver 40% more capabilities in 2026 using AI, with high-adoption teams deploying daily and completing a 3,000-app Java upgrade 6x faster. This is a Cursor promotional claim about AI-assisted development impact.
